name: Sambal Goreng Telor (Eggs in Red Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the chopped onion and garlic in butter until fragrant.
2. Add coconut milk, stock, crushed red pepper, and Laos powder (if using). Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the halved eggs and continue cooking for 3 minutes, stirring gently.
4. Turn off heat and serve hot.
